textByHashes.a36a6b8f800539c10d5959d27777c8797aaa1f08: I do, but human clothes are too hard to mend. They do not have the finesse of elven garments.
textByHashes.bbc94ef4d1d81466432b12cc88c3aa786de77031: Let me take a look at it then.
textByHashes.e9c8582d17ecef705f37fcf8b2d47a9cf9ce474a: There's something disturbingly familiar about the design of these trousers, they are made for an elf.
textByHashes.883c5b80482bce0ce61b761bf6553dcc0cfc8ab2: Of course I can, but I will need two pieces of silk and some bear fur.
textByHashes.05600f53cbd9287176f79f5f0fdcf9b5ce9f85c0: Huh, it's almost like you knew what I needed.
textByHashes.1f308dd7ab59cb748d3e3d5f1c86f26b7983ec2f: I need bear fur and two pieces of silk.
textByHashes.d4b1a759b8a5e0cb922078822b9cebc912c0d3d8: Pass it all here then, and I will get started.
textByHashes.a8244056a6322cde2c0567cf33fcabfcd10eb3e7: I need bear fur and one piece of silk.
textByHashes.a650d876c563e3d5aef1a2a11b7e124970e99436: I only need bear fur now.
textByHashes.8bc35f8b6424eb1101fccdd8fcebebf19d385aaa: I need two pieces of silk.
textByHashes.3a1eae8504a7cd55d89aa850dbcb52e775dbfd81: I only need one piece of silk.
